backend/main.mo: Entry point for the ICP backend actor that includes blob storage functionality via a MixinStorage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of the 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution from the Footer component, listing affected files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' that mounts the app at the root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering section component displaying event offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a scroll-to-contact CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying Jasmine Cota's info card with a clickable phone link, service area, availability, and a call CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright notice, and a 'Made with love in Phoenix AZ' tagline; Caffeine AI attribution has been removed.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with scroll-hide behavior, logo, center tagline, desktop navigation, phone link, and a hamburger menu for mobile with outside-click and Escape-key dismissal.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' featuring a background image, logo, tagline, CTA buttons to scroll to the menu or initiate a call, and a scroll-down indicator.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (tacos, quesadillas, burritos, chips & salsa) with images, descriptions, ingredient details, optional choice selectors, and signature badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, as the site is a static frontend with no backend data fetching needed.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom React hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down/none), current scroll Y position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with a Mexican-inspired OKLCH color palette, custom font utilities, hero gradient, and section divider styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, cream, chili, sienna, verde), display/script/body font families, custom box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a catering website called 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking', currently at version 3, with a pending request to remove the 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution text from the footer component.
